data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the financial penalty requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the financial penalty for cancellations made within 48 hours, but the evidence provided does not confirm the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case describes the penalty but lacks concrete evidence of how the penalty is enforced or tracked, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior step evidence does not address the specific requirement of penalty enforcement, resulting in a blocked validation.
gaps: No evidence of cancellation window tracking implementation or penalty enforcement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
